channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.description: Spain have sealed their place in the 2026 World Cup final, but why did France collapse so easily?

item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Spain received strong performances up and down the lineup as they beat France to make the World Cup final.

item.title: Spain end France's bid for 3rd-straight WC final
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Spain beat France 2-0 in their FIFA World Cup semifinal in Arlington, Texas, on Tuesday to make it three wins in a row against their European heavyweight rival.

item.title: Lewa on Fire: No Euro club would do after Barça
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: New Chicago Fire signing Robert Lewandowski said he couldn't imagine playing for another European club after his four-season stint with Barcelona, and that explains in part his decision to move to MLS.

item.title: Balogun: Red card 'controversy' affected USMNT
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: United States striker Folarin Balogun revealed that he predicted President Donald Trump's involvement in overturning his World Cup suspension would "cause a lot of controversy."

item.title: Infantino reported to IOC over Trump ties at WC
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: A complaint alleging FIFA president Gianni Infantino has breached rules on political neutrality in his dealings with President Donald Trump has been submitted to the International Olympic Committee.

item.title: Man United sign Villa's Tielemans in $47M deal
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United have announced the signing of midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa.

item.title: New Napoli coach Allegri regrets collapse at Milan...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Massimiliano Allegri is not looking for redemption at Napoli despite still being troubled by the end of his second spell in charge of AC Milan.

item.title: Argentina inspired by Maradona for England clash
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina will draw inspiration from the peerless Diego Maradona as a new generation of stars attempt to get the better of England once again.

item.title: Sources: Unimpressed Atleti end Greenwood talks
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Marseille forward Mason Greenwood is nearing a four-year deal deal with Fenerbahçe after Atlético Madrid dropped their pursuit of the former Manchester United player -- saying he was unreachable, sources told ESPN.

item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: FIFA's mandated three-minute breaks have been a talking point throughout the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: France's World Cup dream extinguished in chastening semi-final loss to Spain

item.description: Didier Deschamps' France were hot favourites to lift the famous golden trophy after a string of breathtaking attacking displays at the World Cup. But they met their match in the semi-finals when faced with slick European champions Spain, who outplayed and outsmarted Les Bleus to deny them a third co

item.dc:creator: Leadership

item.title: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: While most fitness trackers are losing the screens to keep the price low, the CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro is a bit different. The budget-friendly smartwatch with a 1.43-inch OLED display is even cheaper than usual at Amazon, where it costs $69 in every color (the price fluctuates between $79 and $99)

item.title: FIFA plans 30-minute half-time show for W’Cup final with Burna Boy, Shakira — Report
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
FIFA plans an extended 30-minute World Cup halftime show featuring Burna Boy, Shakira, and Madonna, despite rules. Get details on the Super Bowl-style spec
Read More: https://punchng.com/fifa-plans-30-minute-half-time-show-for-wcup-final-with-burna-boy-shakira-report/

item.title: BREAKING: Spain beat France to reach first World Cup final since 2010
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: European champions Spain have booked their place in the final of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating France 2-0 in Tuesday’s semi-final. La Roja took the lead in the first half through Mikel Oyarzabal, who calmly converted a penalty before Pedro Porro doubled the advantage after the break

item.title: Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate Today, July 14, 2026: Nigerian Naira continues depreciation
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Naira continued to depreciate against the dollar at the official foreign exchange market on Tuesday. The Central Bank of Nigeria’s data showed that the Naira weakened further to N1,383.08 per dollar on Tuesday, down from N1,379.65 traded on Monday. This means the Nigerian currency slipped

item.title: Top US diplomat visits Nigeria, meets with Ribadu, other officials
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The US Secretary of State disclosed in a post on X that Mr Gracias met with the Minister of State for Foreign Affairs, Sola Enikanolaiye, to discuss relations between both countries. The post Top US diplomat visits Nigeria, meets with Ribadu, other officials appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Oyo Abduction: Row Over Makinde’s Call for UN Probe
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Governor Seyi Makinde’s call for an investigation by the United Nations (UN) and international human rights organisations into the abduction of schoolchildren and teachers in Oriire Local Government Area (LGA) Area of Oyo State on May 15, has sparked controversy. He made the call in a broadcas

item.title: Spain humble France 2-0 to reach World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: Spain has reached the 2026 World Cup final with a 2-0 win over France at Dallas stadium. Goals from Mikel Oryazabal and Pedro Porro sunk the French ships as the Spanish Armada did not allow France’s front three to reach their first final since 2010 with a dominant display. Spain has won seven of the

item.title: World Cup: Spain beat France 2-0 to book final spot
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Spain booked their place in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final after producing a commanding 2-0 victory over France in Tuesday's semi-final at Dallas Stadium, ending Les Bleus' title bid with a composed and clinical display. The post World Cup: Spain beat France 2-0 to book final spot appeared first on T

item.title: Who 'came alive' in the semi-final? France v Spain player ratings
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Spain produce a masterclass to see off France and reach their first World Cup final since 2010 - but who were the stars?
